items.title: Presentation: AI Agents to Make Sense of Data at OpenAI
items.summaryShort: Presentation: AI Agents to Make Sense of Data at OpenAI. OpenAI’s Bonnie Xu discusses Kepler, an internal AI data analyst agent built to query 600+ petabytes of data.

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly Into AI Coding Workflows

items.title: TSRX: A Framework-Agnostic Alternative to JSX
items.summaryShort: TSRX: A Framework-Agnostic Alternative to JSX. TSRX is a TypeScript language extension developed by Dominic Gannaway, designed to build declarative user interfaces in a framework-agnostic manner.

items.title: Article: Designing Continuous Authorization for Sensitive Cloud Systems
items.summaryShort: Article: Designing Continuous Authorization for Sensitive Cloud Systems. Most cloud systems make one authorization decision at login.

items.title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
items.summaryShort: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home. Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

items.title: The CEO of Allbirds' new AI biz has a plan, but no employees
items.summaryShort: The CEO of Allbirds' new AI biz has a plan, but no employees. Call it a startup with a sole founder and a very large seed round, but what's next is less clear.
